temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) At night, a man in a dark suit gets out of the driver's side of a black car. The car is parked on a grassy roadside, with tall green grass on one side and a red-lit building on the other. In the background, the blurred lights of a city skyline are visible. The man closes the car door with a solid thud. (Storyline: This opening shot introduces a character arriving at a location, setting a mysterious and somber tone for the scene.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous musical score begins to play, building tension. The sound of the car door closing is sharp and distinct.)
(00:04-00:05) Inside a dimly lit, wood-paneled room, a woman with her hair pulled back stands and talks on a white landline phone. She wears a brown leather jacket and has a small, framed photo tucked into the back of her jacket. (Storyline: This cut introduces a second character in a different location, suggesting a connection or a parallel action is unfolding. Her phone conversation implies she is waiting for someone or something.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous music continues, linking the two separate scenes.)
